ValidationRule.description: We can only allow users to change owners to the same OBC tag. GCE team can adjust to other company if needed. TBD/Blank need to be done by GCE
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT( $Permission.C_PERM_8030_Bypass_OwnedByCompany_V_RULE ) ,ISCHANGED(OwnerId) ,NOT(INCLUDES(Owner:User.fxUserExtraAttributes__c , "7010-Dynamic OBC Tag")) ,CONTAINS('AES,LSDX', TEXT(Owned_by_Company__c) ) ,LEFT(OwnerId,3)='005' ,CONTAINS('AES,LSDX', TEXT(Owner:User.Owned_by_Company__c)) /*Exclude integration users*/ ,NOT(CONTAINS(Owner:User.License_type__c, 'Partner')) /*Exclude Partner users*/ ,TEXT(Owner:User.Owned_by_Company__c)!= TEXT(Owned_by_Company__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_INTERACTION_007: The new User does not have the same tag as the Interaction. As needed, please pick a different user, or ask GCE to perform special owner transfers
